full_text:
Hou Yin 侯音
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Yin (侯音)was born in Nanyang. Led a revolt in Nanyang and captured its administrator, Dongli Gun, when he seized the commandery capital. He was defeated by Cao Ren. Hou Yin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Hou Yin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
